title: Nasdas w/ Jschlatt, BFDI, ii & ONE
description: A mod with a lot of stuff from random stuff I feel like adding like  hfjone, toilettes ananas nasdas, Inanimate insanity, BFDI, and whatever I add in the future.
body:
MY CHANNEL ON YOUTUBE: https://www.youtube.com/@ieatplutonium47

The actual title is "toilettes ananas nasdas with jschlatt Inanimate Insanity BFDI and that ONE show with that ONE backpack" but it was too long.

A mod with a lot of stuff from random stuff I feel like adding like  hfjone, toilettes ananas nasdas, Inanimate insanity, BFDI, and whatever I add in the future.

Steve Cobs

![Steve Cobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3b47de767564105f64a290963ceab6ba52a8a4d_0.webp)

Fake Virus!!! (it teleports you to the Jschlatt dimension)

![Fake Virus!!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbd07d265aecfa5b9c72a056c2d5b64c290540e6.png)

Jschlatt the boss...

![Jschlatt the boss...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f79c803220aea163416f949318d9935882bf761c.png)

Four another boss...

![Four another boss...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a112d057b0546d061f8c92fce1568d6275b3442d.png)

![Liam and Bryce](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d86adb5b6138b7caf35411422981403eef233cb.png)
